title: orobanche cernua f. hansii
intro: Orobanche cernua f. hansii, also known as the Yellow Broomrape, is a parasitic plant species that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family. It is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Orobanche cernua f. hansii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
